message:
fix(postgres): fix bugs found during fresh-eyes code review

- Fix parameter count overflow: build_parse_msg and build_bind_msg now
  validate that parameter count fits in i16 before casting, preventing
  silent wire message corruption with >32767 parameters
- Fix module-level doc example: was calling query() with params arg that
  doesn't exist; updated to use query_params() and get_typed() which are
  the correct Extended Query Protocol APIs
- Fix oid::BYTEA doc comment: incorrectly said "64-bit integer" instead
  of "Binary data"

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
